channel.title: iOS on Observer
channel.description: Recent content in iOS on Observer

item.title: Acquisition Methods
item.description: Lorem markdownum aequalis strigis. Saetigeri iubeas, vultu huic alvum nondum de obside ut laniavit arbor palmis, cum quin.

item.title: Btfm
item.description: Device Info Get UDID in different ways (using MacOS): ioreg -p IOUSB -l | grep "USB Serial" idevice_id -l # get UDID with ideviceinstaller system_profiler SPUSBDataType | sed -n -e '/iPad/,/Serial/p;/iPhone/,/Serial/p;/iPod/,/Serial/p' | grep "Serial Number:" # instruments -s devices Get BootROM version (old or new):
title: “Rtfm for Mobiles (iOS)” date: 2020-07-08T10:49:24+03:00 RTFM for mobiles #pentest #mobile #fieldmanual ADB adb devices adb shell su adb kill-server See logs:
